description: Create a fixup commit that will auto-squash into the target during an interactive rebase
intents: fix an earlier commit without amending it directly
add a small fix that should fold into a previous commit
prep a commit to be auto-squashed during rebase
tweak a commit that is not the latest one
create a fixup commit for an older commit in the branch
make a follow-up to a specific past commit for autosquash
